Undercurrent
QuizDashboard
Private self-reflection for teens

Find the current under the noise.

Undercurrent helps teens explore what is driving stress, anxiety, and emotional overload, keep progress safe before registration, and track real therapy with a calm, premium interface.

Start the quiz View dashboard

Self-reflection only.

Undercurrent is not a doctor, therapist, or diagnostic tool. It does not provide medical diagnoses, treatment plans, or emergency care. If you think you may be in immediate danger or need urgent help, contact local emergency services or a crisis line right away.

No diagnosis. No clinical label. Just reflection.

Wave Streak

Anonymous first pass

Start with a private, low-pressure reflection before creating an account.

Therapy journey memory

Keep upcoming appointments, moods, and journal notes in one secure hub.

Gentle retention

Use progress waves and milestone badges without adding pressure.

Created by Lakshin Hemachandran
